title: Creamy Spanish Almond Tarta De Santiago
description: A rich and creamy Spanish dessert featuring digestive biscuits and almonds, perfect for a date night, this dish is high in protein and made with an iron teppan, the tarta de santiago form is a classic spanish dessert
instructions: Preheat the iron teppan to 180 degrees Celsius
In a large bowl, mix together the crushed digestive biscuits and melted unsalted butter until well combined
Press the mixture into the iron teppan to form the base of the tarta
In a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, granulated sugar, large eggs, pure almond extract, and salt
Pour the cream mixture over the biscuit base
Bake the tarta for 35 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly
Remove the tarta from the oven and let it cool completely
Sprinkle the sliced almonds over the top of the tarta
Refrigerate the tarta for at least 2 hours before serving
